text:
Once upon a time, there was a shy goldfish named Georgei. Georgei fluttered about his modest aquarium every morning.

One day, Georgei noticed some little fish moving near his tank. They didn't seem scared; they seemed... curious?

That got Georgei thinking. He floated up towards them.

Georgei spoke, surprisingly clearly.

"I thought you were... maybe... fish? I think I'm kind. Care could you tell me?"

The little fish thought for a second.

One eyed glitteringly.

"I think we're... fish..."
